import os, sys, json, inspect
from pathlib import Path
from PIL import Image
import numpy as np

sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR

root = Path(os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data'))
val = root / 'val'
objs = sorted([p for p in val.iterdir() if p.is_dir()])[:3]
print('objs', [p.name for p in objs])
for obj in objs:
    cams = json.load(open(obj/'cameras.json'))
    print('uid', obj.name)
    print('cams', cams[:3])
    for rel in ['input.png', 'target_views/view_01.png', 'target_views/view_06.png']:
        im = Image.open(obj/rel)
        arr = np.array(im)
        print(rel, im.mode, im.size, 'shape', arr.shape, 'minmax', arr.min(), arr.max(), 'mean', arr.reshape(-1, arr.shape[-1]).mean(axis=0).round(2).tolist(), 'alpha_unique_sample', (np.unique(arr[...,3])[:10].tolist() if arr.shape[-1]==4 else None), 'alpha_nonzero', (float((arr[...,3]>0).mean()) if arr.shape[-1]==4 else None))

print('TSR.render signature:', inspect.signature(TSR.render))
print('TSR.forward/call signature:', inspect.signature(TSR.forward))
model = TSR.from_pretrained('/models/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')
print('instance render signature:', inspect.signature(model.render))
print('renderer class', type(model.renderer))
for name in ['set_chunk_size', 'render', 'query_triplane', 'forward']:
    if hasattr(model.renderer, name):
        print('renderer', name, inspect.signature(getattr(model.renderer, name)))
